name: Atari 2600
description: Atari's classic cartridge-based home console platform, central to the early home video game market and pre-crash console era.

eras.title: Foundation Era
eras.description: Early VCS period establishing cartridge-based home console gaming.

eras.title: Mainstream Boom Era
eras.description: Space Invaders, arcade conversions, Activision, and rapid market expansion make the 2600 the dominant home console.

eras.title: Crash and Long Tail Era
eras.description: Post-crash decline followed by budget-era support and long-tail releases.
